title: Public Arcade Collection
genericDescription: Curate a professional portfolio; package multiple works; present design identity to an audience.
specificDescription: Package at least three games from this course into a public arcade page or launcher. Include short descriptions, controls, accessibility notes, credits, process images, press-kit assets, a 60-second reel or trailer, and clear links to source or technical breakdowns when appropriate.
gradingRubric: 30 pts curation quality; 20 pts public usability; 20 pts quality of included games; 15 pts portfolio writing and media assets; 15 pts presentation.
